notes:
Watermark Lab 2.1.0 - watermark existing PDFs.

New:
- Watermark an existing PDF with the same tiled, diagonal style used for PowerPoint. Every page gets the watermark and the original content is preserved (it shows through the semi-transparent text).
- PDFs work everywhere the other formats do: drag & drop, browse, batch a folder, live preview, colour and transparency.

Upgrading: click Yes when prompted; your presets and recent files are kept.
